languages.text: "Бывают дни, когда стремления моего сердца совпадают с требованиями долга. Этот — не из их числа. Но мои братья будут отмщены. Твоей рукой".

traits.locale_text: "Бывают дни, когда стремления моего сердца совпадают с требованиями долга. Этот — не из их числа. Но мои братья будут отмщены. Твоей рукой".
traits.speaker: Blood_Raven

languages.text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."
languages.original_text: "Бывают дни, когда стремления моего сердца совпадают с требованиями долга. Этот — не из их числа. Но мои братья будут отмщены. Твоей рукой".

traits.locale_text: "There are days when the strivings of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."
"There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

"I cannot." {n}The Space Marine shakes his head.{/n} "The vows I have sworn stand higher than momentary vengeance for me. I will find the others, and then we will fight the Necrons shoulder to shoulder, fulfilling our vows, or I will repay the aliens for the death of my brothers."{n}For a moment, the warrior's face contorts with rage, but the grimace disappears as quickly as it appeared.{/n}

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} nods slowly.{/n} "So be it. I will join you later. First, I must find my brothers, be they dead or alive, and scout out this place as I battle my way through it." {n}For a moment, the warrior's face contorts with rage, but the grimace disappears as quickly as it appeared.{/n}

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} nods slowly.{/n} "So be it. I will join you later. First, I must find my brothers, be they dead or alive, and scout out this place as I battle my way through it." {n}For a moment, the warrior's face contorts with rage, but the grimace disappears as quickly as it appeared.{/n}
"There are days when the strivings of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."
"There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

languages.text: 「私はできない」{n}宇宙海兵は首を横に振る。{/n}「私が誓った誓いは、一時的な復讐よりも重要だ。他の仲間を見つけ、共に肩を並べてネクロンの敵と戦う。誓いを守る。あるいは、兄弟の死を復讐する。」{n}戦士の顔は一瞬、怒りで歪むが、その表情は消え去った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I cannot." {n}The Space Marine shakes his head.{/n} "The vows I have sworn stand higher than momentary vengeance for me. I will find the others, and then we will fight the Necrons shoulder to shoulder, fulfilling our vows, or I will repay the aliens for the death of my brothers."{n}For a moment, the warrior's face contorts with rage, but the grimace disappears as quickly as it appeared.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私はできない」{n}宇宙海兵は首を横に振る。「私が誓った誓いは、一時的な復讐よりも重要だ。他の仲間を見つけ、共に肩を並べてネクロンの敵と戦う。誓いを守る。あるいは、兄弟の死を復讐する。」{n}戦士の顔は一瞬、怒りで歪むが、その表情は消え去った。

languages.text: «Hay días en los que los deseos de mi corazón y las exigencias de mi deber coinciden. Hoy no es uno de ellos. Pero mis hermanos serán vengados. Por ti».
languages.original_text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

traits.locale_text: «Hay días en los que los deseos de mi corazón y las exigencias de mi deber coinciden. Hoy no es uno de ellos. Pero mis hermanos serán vengados. Por ti».

languages.text: "Es gibt Tage, an denen die Wünsche meines Herzens den Anforderungen der Pflicht entsprechen. Heute ist keiner dieser Tage. Und doch werden meine Brüder gerächt werden. Durch Eure Hand."
languages.original_text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt Tage, an denen die Wünsche meines Herzens den Anforderungen der Pflicht entsprechen. Heute ist keiner dieser Tage. Und doch werden meine Brüder gerächt werden. Durch Eure Hand."

languages.text: « Certains jours, les désirs de mon cœur coïncident avec les exigences de mon devoir. Ce n'est pas le cas aujourd'hui, mais mes frères seront tout de même vengés. Par votre intermédiaire. »
languages.original_text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

traits.locale_text: « Certains jours, les désirs de mon cœur coïncident avec les exigences de mon devoir. Ce n'est pas le cas aujourd'hui, mais mes frères seront tout de même vengés. Par votre intermédiaire. »

languages.text: “有时，我内心的渴望与我的职责正好重合。但今天并非如此。可我兄弟们的仇必须要报，借由你的手。”
languages.original_text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

traits.locale_text: “有时，我内心的渴望与我的职责正好重合。但今天并非如此。可我兄弟们的仇必须要报，借由你的手。”

languages.text: "Kalbimin arzularının görevin gerekleriyle örtüştüğü günler vardır. Bu onlardan biri değil. Yine de kardeşlerimin intikamı alınacak. Alan da sen olacaksın."
languages.original_text: "There are days when the desires of my heart align with the demands of duty. This is not one of them. Yet my brothers shall be avenged. By your hand."

traits.locale_text: "Kalbimin arzularının görevin gerekleriyle örtüştüğü günler vardır. Bu onlardan biri değil. Yine de kardeşlerimin intikamı alınacak. Alan da sen olacaksın."
